title: China builds crude stock amidst turnaround peak, hope for new quotas
section_path: China builds crude stock amidst turnaround peak, hope for new quotas
section_path_text: China builds crude stock amidst turnaround peak, hope for new quotas
summary:
Main
China's onshore crude stockpiles reflect demand weakness beyond seasonal norms. By Emma Li
China's onshore crude inventories increased by 33mb over four consecutive weeks, ending on May 19, reaching 942 million barrels. This build-up followed two months of inventories hovering near one-year lows.
